creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
Microsoft Notebook Optical Mouse 3000 (Model 1049) gets recognized  
with patch as ums

ums0: Microsoft Notebook Optical Mouse with Tilt Wheel, class 0/0, rev  
2.00/1.20, addr 2 on uhub0
ums0: 3 buttons and Z dir and a TILT dir.

But it isn't functional in Xorg or with moused.


I'm using FreeBSD 7 (RELENG_7).
